details.test: Task 1: Local move quote for 2 containers with cheapest delivery window added to cart
Task 2: Long-distance move with 1 container, Saturday delivery, and packing supplies under $75 added to cart
Task 3: Select storage unit via comparison under $250/month
Task 4: Find 24/7, highly rated storage location within 15 miles and start container reservation
Task 5: Create local move quote then modify date, quantity, and insurance
Task 6: Use space calculator for 2-bedroom apartment and start reservation from recommendation
Task 7: Apply new-customer promo code of at least 10% off to move quote
Task 8: Find cancellation policy and start live chat about cancelling 3 days before move
Task 9: Schedule 30-day portable storage booking under $200/month with standard delivery and add to cart
